sentences.arabic: غَسْلُ الْيَدَيْنِ بِالْمَاءِ وَالصَّابُونِ يَقِي مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Pranje ruku sapunom i vodom štiti od bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Washing hands with soap and water protects against diseases.

sentences.translation: Dobro sam očistio zube četkicom i pastom.
sentences.translationEn: I cleaned my teeth well with a brush and toothpaste.

sentences.arabic: النَّظَافَةُ الشَّخْصِيَّةُ جُزْءٌ مُهِمٌّ مِنَ الصِّحَّةِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Lična higijena je važan dio općeg zdravlja.
sentences.translationEn: Personal hygiene is an important part of general health.
